creator: alexander@wittig.name
text:
Sorry, I just noticed that someone already submitted the same patch a 
day ago (see ports/152535) which I missed. You can close this one, it 
contains no new information.

Thanks!


Am 24.11.10 20:50 schrieb FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/152562'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.
>
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=152562
>
>> Category:       ports
>> Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>> Synopsis:       [PATCH] www/phpbb3 pkg-plist deletes config.php file
